case_title: BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS LLC VS. THE OTHER SIDE OF THE STREET LLC DBA THE REPUBLIC ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,134.36 FILED BY BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT THE OTHER SIDE OF THE STREET LLC DBA THE REPUBLIC AMIRGHASSEMKHANY, SHAW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-11-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE OTHER SIDE OF THE STREET LLC DBA THE REPUBLIC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. WILLIAM JOHNSON APEARS FOR PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO SHAW AMIRGHASSENKHANY RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE OTHER SIDE OF THE STREET LLC DBA THE REPUBLIC $4,134.36 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,229.36, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLIAM AGAINST DEFENDANT SHAW AMIRGHASSEMKHANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SHAW AMIRGHASSEMKHANY, AS MANAGING MEMBER OF DEFENDANT, THE OTHER SIDE OF THE STREET, LLC, WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AS TO THIS DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANTS RETURNED IN OPEN ENVELOPE THAT WAS STAPLED CLOSED = RETURN TO SENDER, UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO SENDER, UNABLE TO FORWARD/FOR REVIEW
